metadata.title:
BOMB GRAzEO


HUCK'S HEAD

IT WAS FULL OF ASHES AND
MADE A NOISE LIKE MORE
WAR ON THE EMPLOYMENT
AGENTS.

pages.raw_text:
Was this deliberate attempt on
the part of some vengeful individ-
ual with malice toward employ
ment agents, to assassinate c. u.
Huck, or was it just a mere acct
dent for which no one has offered
an apology?


While standing in front of the
door of the Carr employment
bureau in the basement of the
building, at Front and Stevens, S.
u. Huck. clerk of the agency, mar
rowly escaped death or injury from
heavy box, filed with ashes and
cinders that fioated down from a
window four stories above Huck' S
pnsuspecting head.


The box missed him by a few
inches and went to splinters as it
struck the concrete.


Huck was unable to locate the
|party who had heaved the heavy
missile over the window sill many
feet above, where reside folks who
are making war on employment
agents and break up their furni-
ture.


Mr.. Huck has been clerk in the
Carr employment agency for sew
eral months and is generally well
liked by the patrons of the Office.
Consequently, he is at loss to
know why an attempt would be
made to do him harm.
